fit_assessment.explanation: The candidate directly meets the requirements. He possesses over 13 years of commercial operations, procurement, and supplier relationship management experience in top-tier tech environments (Twilio, Bird). Furthermore, he demonstrates strong hands-on capability in Python-based and AI-enabled workflows through several documented personal projects incorporating LLMs (Gemini), structured data validation (Pydantic), and decision-making logic.
relevant_experience: Extensive commercial operations and negotiation experience at Twilio and Bird B.V., managing high-value agreements and cost optimization frameworks.
Practical development of Python and AI workflows, including the 'Decision Making Helper' and 'CV Optimizer' projects which utilize Streamlit, FastAPI, and Gemini.
Cross-functional coordination and enablement management at TeleSign and Infobip, working directly on technical integrations and risk-management compliance tools.
missing_requirements: Lacks a formal corporate job title explicitly designated as 'AI Project Coordinator', though his project portfolio and previous roles cover the exact responsibilities required.

cv_patch.professional_summary: Commercial and product-oriented professional with more than 13 years of experience in commercial operations, strategic partnerships, and cross-functional project coordination. Combines enterprise commercial negotiation and procurement expertise with hands-on AI workflow development using Python, FastAPI, and Gemini. Highly skilled in stakeholder management, structured process improvement, and clearly documenting complex technical and commercial decisions.

responsibilities: Manage the complete partner lifecycle from identification and pricing strategy through negotiation, contracting, technical integration, and go-live.
Act as a business-side product owner supporting operational improvements to internal tools and reporting infrastructure.
Work closely with routing, technical, and support teams to deliver tailored services and ensure smooth onboarding.
Manage and expand business with existing partners through upselling and cross-selling omnichannel services.
Managed strategic negotiations, risk analysis, procurement coordination, and supplier agreements for approximately 180 wholesale partnerships.
Designed and implemented a structured operational framework for cost-effective management of long-tail providers, improving the cost base by 18 percent.
Managed the sales pipeline, defined pricing strategies, and coordinated cross-functional initiatives to support business growth.
Worked directly with the knowledge-engineering team as a key stakeholder on an AI-enabled tool designed for phishing prevention.
Managed the enablement and deployment pipeline for top-tier customers preparing for technical go-live.
Ensured customer use cases complied with legal, regulatory, and structured risk-management guidelines.

supported_requirements: Experience with stakeholder management and commercial operations
Practical familiarity with Python-based or AI-enabled workflows
Strong written English and capability to clearly document decisions
reasonably_derived_requirements: Structured process improvement, derived from designing and implementing a wholesale provider framework at Twilio and improving internal tools at Bird B.V.

unsupported_requirements.requirement: Formal enterprise-level AI project management certification
unsupported_requirements.preparation_recommendation: Review current industry frameworks for managing AI product lifecycles and compliance standards like the EU AI Act.
unsupported_requirements.interview_guidance: Focus on your hands-on experience structuring inputs/outputs using Pydantic and managing decision validation workflows in your 'Decision Making Helper' project.

warnings: Ensure your hands-on technical projects (Python and Gemini) are highlighted as highly relevant practical proof of your AI-enabled workflow capability, since your recent corporate titles are commercially focused.
